totemresize.title: Totem Resizer
totemresize.option.held_scale.tooltip:
Controls the size of the Totem of Undying in your Main Hand / Off-Hand.

  1  = Not Visible (0.0×)
  2  = Barely Visible (0.1×)
  3  = Small (0.4×)
  4  = Slightly Smaller (0.7×)
  5  = Regular Size (1.0×) — Vanilla
  6  = Slightly Larger (1.3×)
  7  = Larger (1.7×)
  8  = Big (2.2×)
  9  = Very Large (3.0×)
  10 = Max Size (5.0×)

Changes apply only after you click Save & Exit.
totemresize.option.pop_scale.tooltip:
Controls the size of the on-screen animation when a Totem of Undying is consumed.

  1  = Not Visible (0.0×)
  2  = Barely Visible (0.1×)
  3  = Small (0.4×)
  4  = Slightly Smaller (0.7×)
  5  = Regular Size (1.0×) — Vanilla
  6  = Slightly Larger (1.3×)
  7  = Larger (1.7×)
  8  = Big (2.2×)
  9  = Very Large (3.0×)
  10 = Max Size (5.0×)

Changes apply only after you click Save & Exit.
